# `api.jobs.payment.get_sources`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/payment/sources` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.payment.get_sources(job_display_id: int) -> list[PaymentSource]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs payment get_sources <job_display_id>
```

``GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/payment/sources``

## Response

Returns a list of `List[PaymentSource]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sourceId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Payment source ID |
| `type` | `Optional[str]` | no | card or bank_account |
| `lastFour` | `Optional[str]` | no | Last 4 digits |
| `brand` | `Optional[str]` | no | Card brand (Visa, etc.) |
| `isDefault` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Default source flag |
